name: io.github.bimwright/bimwright
title: Bimwright
description: MCP gateway for Autodesk Revit 2022-2027 — expose the Revit API as AI-callable tools with progressive disclosure (toolset gating), a Transaction-safe batch_execute, and a ToolBaker self-evolution engine. Pair the NuGet tool with the Revit plugin distributed on GitHub Releases.
